title: Xtra Buttery Indian Sesame Naan
description: A buttery and shaggy Indian dish featuring sesame seed naan, perfect for a sick day, made with a pasta water emulsion and nut-free friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sesame seeds, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the cooled pasta water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or tava over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 6 equal portions and roll each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 6 inches in diameter.
Brush the melted butter evenly over the naan, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Cook the naan for 1-2 minutes on each side, until it is golden brown and puffed up.
Brush the ghee or oil over the naan and serve hot.
